cited_facts.why_it_matters: Explicitly states the amendment was disabled due to a bug and will be replaced, indicating it is no longer a valid candidate for activation.
Explicitly labels the amendment status as 'obsolete/removed', which triggers the REJECT rule for retired/obsolete proposals.

output_json.decision_summary: The packet explicitly identifies the amendment 'PermissionDelegation' as obsolete and removed (F5) and notes it was disabled due to a bug with a replacement planned (F1). According to the task rule, REJECT must be used for retired/obsolete proposals. This takes precedence over other considerations.

validator_work_item.title: Reject Obsolete Amendment: PermissionDelegation
